chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 4060 of 2017 CP D 4696 of 2017 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) For hearing of main case 28-03-2025 None present for the petitioner Mr. Muhammad Siddique, advocate holds brief for Mr. Khalid Mehmood Rajpar, advocate for respondent. Ms. Mahreen Ibrahim, Deputy Attorney General. These petitions are pending since 2017 without any significant progress. Petitioners are unrepresented without any intimation or justification. Petitions are dismissed for non-prosecution. Office is directed to place copy hereof in connected petition. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
